issues.message: Proposal wording says openspec-reviewer-skill and openspec-optimizer-skill prompt capabilities gain timeout/input-contract expectations, but design explicitly declares modifying reviewer/optimizer skill prompt content as a non-goal. The implemented requirements and tasks consistently target verify template orchestration, so this is artifact wording drift rather than missing required behavior.

verificationContext.gitDiffSummary: Implementation/test/task diff covers seven files: tasks checkboxes marked complete; opsx-fragments.ts adds VERIFY_COORDINATOR_ROLE and VERIFY_SUBAGENT_TIMEOUT_RULES; verify-change.ts injects coordinator role, 10-label mode table, mode-labeled steps, explicit reviewer/optimizer delegation, timeout rules, and checkpoint table before hard rules; tests add fragment, generated-template, parity, delegation/API-negative, and checkpoint-order assertions. Diff stat for those seven files: 258 insertions, 75 deletions. Change artifact files are present as added files.
